channel.title: CMCSA — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on CMCSA (Comcast) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: ADDED CMCSA (+50%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Joel Greenblatt (Gotham Asset Management) added CMCSA in Q4 2025 · 0.2% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Joel Greenblatt)

item.title: Bill Nygren: ADDED CMCSA (+24%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Bill Nygren (Oakmark Funds) added CMCSA in Q4 2025 · 1.0% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Bill Nygren)

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: TRIMMED CMCSA (-50%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Joel Greenblatt (Gotham Asset Management) trimmed CMCSA in Q2 2025 · 0.2% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Joel Greenblatt)

item.title: Andreas Halvorsen: EXITED CMCSA (-100%) · Q1 2025
item.description: Andreas Halvorsen (Viking Global Investors) exited CMCSA in Q1 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Andreas Halvorsen)

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: ADDED CMCSA (+19%) · Q1 2025
item.description: Joel Greenblatt (Gotham Asset Management) added CMCSA in Q1 2025 · 0.6% of portfolio.
